# CLKComplicationTemplateModularLargeTallBody

**Class**

A template for displaying a header row and row of tall body text.

## Declaration

```swift
class CLKComplicationTemplateModularLargeTallBody
```

## Overview

This template belongs to the [doc://com.apple.clockkit/documentation/ClockKit/CLKComplicationFamily/modularLarge] family.



## Creating the Template

- **init(headerTextProvider:bodyTextProvider:)**: Creates a template that has a header and a row of tall body text.

## Setting the Complication Data

- **headerTextProvider**: The text to display in the header line.
- **bodyTextProvider**: The text to display in the body line.

## Body templates

- **CLKComplicationTemplateModularLargeStandardBody**: A template for displaying a header row and two lines of text.

## Inherits From

- CLKComplicationTemplate

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSCopying
- NSObjectProtocol
